lines.speaker: Schoolboy
lines.text: *sniff* They won't let me take an arrowhead as a souvenir.

lines.speaker: Schoolboy
lines.text: I wonder what they're doing behind that rope.

lines.speaker: Schoolboy
lines.text: Can you find my teacher? I need the toilet!

lines.speaker: Schoolboy
lines.text: Teacher! Can we go to the Natural History exhibit now?

lines.speaker: Schoolboy
lines.text: I wanna be an archaeologist when I grow up!
